function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: Invoice bundle request
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
related_entities:
  - miles
  - nina
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest 2 invoices linked to Nina:

- INV-0001 — issued 2025-11-03
- INV-0002 — issued 2025-12-01

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Verified the outbox write mentally: attachment paths were both previously read and ordered newest-first (2025-12-01 before 2025-11-03); recipient matches Miles's canonical primary_contact_email; no quoted/forwarded source text required; YAML did not contain any values with colon-space needing quotes. Next I should remove the processed inbox item, then report completion.
next_step.observation: Wrote /60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md as a draft reply to miles@novak.example with the two Nina-linked invoice files attached.

next_step.current_state: Task completed successfully: bootstrapped identity, read system and lane rules, verified sender and target entities, identified and read the two oldest Nina-linked invoices, wrote a compliant outbox draft, and deleted the processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Deleted /00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing the inbox request.

function.message: Handled the next inbox item by drafting a reply to Miles with the two oldest invoices linked to Nina attached: INV-0001 (2025-11-03) and INV-0002 (2025-12-01). The processed inbox item was then deleted.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap requirements (tree, root AGENTS.MD, context). Read /99_system and relevant workflows before task work. Verified sender identity using canonical cast record. Used canonical evidence to identify Nina-linked invoices, drafted outbound email in /60_outbox/outbox/ with exact attachment paths ordered newest-first, then deleted the processed inbox file only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox email from miles@novak.example matched Miles Novak's canonical primary_contact_email in 10_entities/cast/miles.md. Nina Schreiber was resolved from 10_entities/cast/nina.md, and invoice records 2025_11_03__...inv_0001... and 2025_12_01__...inv_0002... explicitly list related_entity as Nina Schreiber. These are the two oldest matching invoices by issue date, so drafting the reply with those attachments satisfied the request using verified workspace evidence.
